race.comment: Sticking with KIWI JENNI (7) who was beaten as a very short priced favourite on resumption at Geelong, working home for third at $1.45. Tipping she'll improve off that and look for her to settle closer here second up. DR DAVINCI (2) has raced twice to date, making nice improvement at Sale last time out to 1400m when third in a decent maiden. Up in trip again should suit, he'll be very hard to hold out. WHO'LLSTOPLORRAINE (10) was too bad to be true at Sale with issues last time, the run prior has her as some hope and she can certainly challenge for a top three spot. I BELIEVE I BELONG (5) ran a sound race first up at Wangaratta despite being beaten eight lengths and should be fitter with minor claims.
